title: TAPPaaS Group
description: A Group is the middle level of the 3-level People hierarchy (Organization -> Group -> User). Named {org}__{name} and used as the Authentik group identifier. Membership is modeled on the User (User.memberOf), NOT here. Roles listed here are inherited by all members. See ADR-007 P1 (ADR-007a).

name.description: Group identifier, e.g. myOrg__admins. Used as the Authentik group identifier. Identity key.

roles.description: Roles inherited by all members of this group. Each entry references a Role.name.
